events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: this is a **fail**, critical risk. The staged arc-rated clothing's rating is below the incident energy/PPE category documented on the equipment's arc-flash label, so the technician would be under-protected for the actual hazard. Work must stop, the label data reconciled against NFPA 70E Table 130.7(C)(15) (or an incident-energy study), and correctly rated PPE issued before proceeding.
